title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara (Community Enhanced)
ingredients: extra Pecorino and a pinch of red pepper flakes
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
Whisk egg yolks with cheeses and pepper.
Toss hot pasta with pancetta, remove from heat.
Add egg mixture and toss quickly.

source_review.text: Absolutely perfect! I used thick-cut bacon instead of pancetta and added a splash of pasta water at the end. The consistency was creamy and delicious.

modifications_applied.reasoning: User preferred the taste and texture of thick-cut bacon over pancetta

source_review.text: Good recipe but needed more salt. I added extra Pecorino and a pinch of red pepper flakes for some heat.

modifications_applied.reasoning: To add more flavor and heat to the dish

changes_made.to_text: extra Pecorino and a pinch of red pepper flakes

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: User preferred the taste and texture of thick-cut bacon over pancetta; To add more flavor and heat to the dish
